## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (per `RELEASING.md`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, config, or API changed (`npm run docs:verify` passes)
- [ ] Single-purpose change; no unrelated churn
- [ ] No secrets, internal infrastructure, or private URLs introduced
